productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Green Check Shirt
description: Composition Green and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket with embroidered branding on the left chest, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Warm iron Bring the zing back with this US Polo shirt. The cotton fabric ensures optimal comfort and the stylish design earns a definite fashion accolade. Pair it with jeans, classy accessories and shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
